title: Prudii Skirata
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Otheruses|Null}} {{Citation}} {{Character |type=Mandalorian |image=[[File:Prudii.jpg]] |name=Prudii Skirata
"Null-5" |homeworld=[[Kamino/Legends|Kamino]]{{DB|organization|clonetroopers|clone troopers}} |birth=[[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]] |death= |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]] {{C|[[Cloning/Legends|clone]]}} |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=new |donor=[[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]] |height=1.83 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] |mass= |hair=Black |feathers= |eyes=Brown |skin= |cyber= |families= |parents= |partners= |siblings= |children= |affiliation=*[[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] *[[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorians]] **[[Clan Skirata]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|Every factory we hit is producing numbers like that. Judging by the raw material freight we monitor, there are still a lot more factories out there, but I think we're talking about a few hundred million droids.''"
"''That's reassuring. Thanks. I'll sleep well tonight.''"
"''And so you should ''ner vod''. They say they're making ''quadrillions'' of droids. A quadrillion has fifteen zeros. A ''thousand million'' millions, not a few ''hundred''. Are we missing something here?|Atin and Prudii Skirata discussing droid numbers|{{InsiderCite|87|Odds}}}} '''Prudii Skirata''', formerly known as '''Null-5''' or '''N-5''' was one of twelve [[Null-class Advanced Recon Commando|Null-class ARC troopers]] created for use in the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] as a [[Lieutenant/Legends|lieutenant]]. Due to the genetic tampering, Prudii and his five brothers had slightly improved muscular structures, eidetic memory, and an enhanced intelligence that was at least a 35% higher intelligence score over the ordinary [[Clone trooper/Legends|clones]]. When he and the other Nulls were two years old, [[Kal Skirata]] saved them from termination by the [[Kaminoan/Legends|Kaminoan]] clone scientists. After that, they remained loyal only to Skirata. ==Biography== After the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|First Battle of Geonosis]], Prudii and his brothers were scheduled for chill-down because they were uncommandable except by Kal Skirata. Skirata saved them from chill-down and eventually the Null Squad became [[Clone Intelligence/Legends|Clone Intelligence]] Units (MILINT) who worked for the [[Special Operations Brigade/Legends|Special Operations Brigade]] under the command of [[Jedi General/Legends|Jedi General]] [[Arligan Zey]]; as well as Kal Skirata's "private army", searching for the Kaminoan clone technician [[Ko Sai/Legends|Ko Sai]] in order to force her to stop the age acceleration process. Prudii specialized in sabotage of [[Droid/Legends|droid]] factories. After installment as military intelligence unit, he spent the first year after [[Geonosis/Legends|Geonosis]] with sabotaging major droid factories throughout [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]], visiting 49 different planets and possibly interrogating and assassinating an important [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] metallurgist who gave him vital clues on the metallurgic structure of droids. Instead of blowing the factories up, he developed a technique that couldn't be detected by Separatist quality control. Mereel used to call this technique "Prudii's patented droid remover". He wore specialized [[ARC trooper armor/Legends|ARC trooper armor]] with stealth coating that couldn't be detected by droids, thus enabling him to enter droid factories unnoticed. He then sliced the main computers and slightly changed the recipe for creating droids by adding 5% extra [[carvanium]]. On the battlefield, these droids crumbled when hit with any weapon. His sabotage acts were so successful that the kill ratio for [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]] in the field was raised from 1:20 droids to 1:50 droids during the first year of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. 460 days after Geonosis, he trained [[Clone commando/Legends|clone commando]] [[Atin Skirata|RC-3222]] on [[Olanet]] in his sabotage technique. Together they entered [[Sabotage of Olanet Droid Factory|the droid factory on Olanet]], which was regarded as a high value target by military intel, and sliced the main computer. Atin then returned to his squad at [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] HQ and introduced [[Omega Squad]] to the new technique while Prudii continued his work. In addition, he then joined his brothers in the search for Ko Sai. At the conclusion of the Clone Wars, Prudii extracted to Kal Skirata's haven of [[Kyrimorut/Legends|Kyrimorut]] on [[Mandalore/Legends|Mandalore]]. ==Personality and traits== "Prudii" means "shadow" in [[Mando'a/Legends|Mando'a]]. He was completely fluent in Mando'a because Kal Skirata taught this language to all his Null ARCs, together with the [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] culture. Atin described Prudii as a "glib cynic" (as well as adoring son when facing Kal Skirata). Prudii hated being called "Sir" or "Lieutenant" by other clones because he was of the strong opinion that all clones were brothers—even the [[Alpha-class Advanced Recon Commando|Alpha ARCs]], who always appeared to have some personal differences with the Null ARCs. Atin had the impression that Prudii looked slightly older than his brothers [[Ordo Skirata|Ordo]] and [[Mereel Skirata|Mereel]]. ==Armor and Equipment== Prudii wore the Phase 1 ARC armor with the blue markings due to him having the rank of [[Lieutenant]]. With the equipment he had, he carried two DC-17 hand blasters along with the DC-15a blaster rifle. ==Appearances== *''[[Republic Commando: Triple Zero]]'' {{1st}} {{Flash}} *{{InsiderCite|87|Odds}} *''[[Republic Commando: True Colors]]'' {{Mo}} *''[[Order 66: A Republic Commando Novel]]'' *''[[Imperial Commando: 501st]]'' ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' *''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{NullARCsNav}} {{Interlang |de=Prudii Skirata |pl=Prudii Skirata }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Skirata, Prudii}} [[Category:Clan Skirata]] [[Category:Clone trooper lieutenants]] [[Category:Galactic Republic deserters]] [[Category:Males]] [[Category:Null-class Advanced Recon Commandos]] [[Category:Special Operations Brigade personnel]]
